tasks.title: [Discord #general] Establish kanban workflow for all tasks
tasks.description:
Set up process to ensure all tasks from any channel are tracked on kanban board
- Auto-create tasks for every request
- Update status as work progresses
- Mark done when complete
- Use prefixes for context: [Discord], [DM], [Project X]

tasks.title: [Discord #general] ChipStack QA - Test Players/Games/Stats flows
tasks.description:

Test Players, Games, and Stats flows
Write report to workspace/chipstack-qa-report-v3.md
Assigned by dhsiao via Discord #general

tasks.title: [Discord #general] Add scheduled auto-archive for done tasks
tasks.description:
Set up Vercel Cron Jobs to auto-archive tasks in Done status for >7 days
- Configured in vercel.json
- Runs daily at midnight UTC
- Calls /api/tasks/archive?auto=true
Status: Completed by codex

tasks.title: Weekly memory maintenance automation
tasks.description: Created weekly-memory-maintenance.sh automation script. Analyzes MEMORY.md for duplicates/stale items, generates maintenance reports, and syncs to 2nd Brain. Found 1 duplicate constraint to review.

tasks.title: Complete: Front-End Diagnostic Assessment (24 questions)
tasks.description: Full diagnostic covering JS fundamentals, React, Next.js, TypeScript, CSS, Testing, System Design, Performance, Accessibility, Algorithms, DevOps, Behavioral. Answer all 24 questions to establish baseline.

tasks.title: Build: Task Management Dashboard
tasks.description: Portfolio project to fill state management gap. Features: Kanban board with drag-drop (dnd-kit), Zustand for client state, React Query for server state, optimistic updates, real-time collaboration mock. Stack: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Zustand, TanStack Query, shadcn/ui. Deploy to Vercel. Why: 80% of job postings mention state management - current resume lacks this keyword.

tasks.title: cron-error-tracking-system
tasks.description: Created cron error logging system: cron-wrapper.sh for capturing job output/errors, cron-diagnostics.sh for health monitoring, updated workspace-status.sh with error tracking section
